items.name: 十楽院のカヤの木
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: A monument in the natural monument category, the nutmeg-yew (kaya) tree of Jūraku-in. Village-designated by Ōtama Village on 1977-07-14. Located at Tamai Aza Bakuronai, Ōtama Village.

items.name: 相応寺薬師如来三尊像(薬師如来・日光・月光菩薩)

en.name_en: Yakushi Nyorai Triad of Sōō-ji Temple (Yakushi Nyorai, Nikkō and Gakkō Bodhisattvas)
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property, the Yakushi Nyorai triad of Sōō-ji Temple, comprising Yakushi Nyorai and the Nikkō and Gakkō Bodhisattvas. Village-designated by Ōtama Village. Located at Tamai Aza Minamimachi, Ōtama Village.
